title: ZX Snake & ZX Brick Released
content: Today marks a major milestone for BarkinMad Studios as ZX Snake and ZX Brick are now officially available on the Apple App Store.

Both games are inspired by the golden age of 8-bit arcade gaming while adding modern features designed for today's players. From quick gaming sessions to chasing leaderboard positions, both titles are built to capture the addictive gameplay that made classic arcade games so memorable.

ZX Snake reimagines the classic snake formula with retro visuals, unlockable content, achievements, Game Center leaderboards, AI opponents, local multiplayer battles, and online player-versus-player matches.

ZX Brick delivers fast-paced brick-breaking action across 100 handcrafted levels. Players can collect powerful upgrades, unlock achievements, compete for high scores, and experience a modern take on a timeless arcade classic.

Both games feature full Game Center integration, achievement systems, leaderboard support, and localisation across 32 languages, allowing players around the world to enjoy the experience in their preferred language.

The launch of ZX Snake and ZX Brick represents the beginning of the ZX series from BarkinMad Studios. Development is already underway on ZX Space, a retro-inspired arcade space shooter that will continue the studio's mission of bringing classic gaming experiences to modern mobile devices.
Thank you to everyone who has supported BarkinMad Studios throughout development. Download ZX Snake and ZX Brick today and start your journey to the top of the leaderboards.
